integration.title: Seamless Integration
integration.description: Works with your existing practice management systems

questions.question: How quickly can we get online booking set up?
questions.answer: Most practices are fully set up within 1-2 weeks. The process includes connecting to your practice management system, configuring your scheduling rules, setting up provider calendars, and integrating the booking widget on your website. Our implementation team handles most of the work, requiring only a few hours of your time.

questions.question: Can patients book for specific procedures?
questions.answer: Yes, you can set up different appointment types with specific durations for different procedures. You control which procedures are available for online booking. For complex treatments requiring consultation first, you can set up specific 'consultation' appointment types that book the right amount of time.

questions.question: How does it prevent double-booking?
questions.answer: Our system syncs in real-time with your practice management software. When a patient books online, that time slot is immediately blocked in your schedule. Similarly, when your staff books appointments, those slots are instantly removed from online availability.

questions.question: Can we set specific hours for online booking?
questions.answer: Absolutely. You have full control over which days and times are available for online booking. You can set different hours for different providers, block out lunch breaks, reserve certain times for specific procedures, or keep some slots available only for staff to book directly.

questions.question: What happens if a patient needs to reschedule?
questions.answer: Patients can easily reschedule or cancel their appointments through our platform. When they receive confirmation or reminder emails/texts, they include links to modify their appointment. The system enforces your rules about cancellation windows and can automatically add cancellation fees if configured.

reviews.name: Dr. Sarah Johnson
reviews.comment: Adding online booking has transformed our front desk operations. Our staff now spends less time on the phone and more time providing personalized attention to patients in the office. Plus, we're seeing a significant increase in new patient appointments that come in overnight!

reviews.name: Dr. Michael Rodriguez
reviews.comment: The integration with our existing management system was seamless. Patients love the convenience, and our no-show rate has dropped by almost 40% with the automated reminders. I only wish we had implemented this years ago.

reviews.name: Lisa Patel
reviews.comment: Managing appointments for multiple orthodontists used to be incredibly complicated. The online booking system has simplified everything with its rules engine that ensures the right appointments go to the right providers. Our patients particularly appreciate the family booking feature for multiple children.
